name: The Devil is in the Spectrum: Mitigating Representation Collapse in LLMs via Topologically Regularized Side-Path
summary: arXiv:2607.20484v1 Announce Type: new Abstract: Large Language Models (LLMs) are fundamentally limited by representation collapse, a bottleneck that severely degrades long-context performance. We i...
description: arXiv:2607.20484v1 Announce Type: new Abstract: Large Language Models (LLMs) are fundamentally limited by representation collapse, a bottleneck that severely degrades long-context performance. We identify that existing approaches risk drifting into one of two pathological extremes: homogenization collapse (e.g., attention sinks causing rank deficiency) and isolation collapse (e.g., local attent...
author: Yiheng Tao, Kaiwen Cheng, Yao Lu, Chang Liu, Jie Chen
